titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bakkar Ibn Kurdum
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bakkar Ibn Kurdum

segments: ه عن بكار بن كردم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رحمه اللّه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بكار بن كردم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن بكار بن كردم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رحمه اللّه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بكار بن كردم‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Bakkar ibn Kurdum, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bakkar ibn Kurdum.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Bakkar ibn Kurdum, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bakkar ibn Kurdum.
